projects.title: Fluento
projects.description: Fluento is an AI-powered language pronunciation trainer that helps users improve spoken accuracy by providing text-to-speech examples, analyzing user speech, scoring pronunciation quality, and tracking progress with real-time feedback

projects.title: Revive
projects.description: Revive is a clean and intuitive fitness-tracking application that allows users to manage daily tasks, follow guided workouts, and monitor health metrics such as BMI—helping users stay organized and consistent in their fitness journey.

projects.title: Decibel Detect
projects.description: Decibel Detect is a noise monitoring project designed to help detect and control excessive sound levels in environments such as classrooms, hospitals, offices, and residential areas. The system is useful for maintaining a quiet and safe atmosphere by identifying when noise exceeds acceptable limits, making it helpful for noise pollution monitoring and awareness.

projects.title: Process Performance Analyzer
projects.description: Developed Process Performance Analyzer, a cross-platform tool designed to monitor system processes, track performance load, and alert users when the system is overutilized or when unused processes occupy resources.

projects.title: Gesture Flow
projects.description: Developed a real-time hand-gesture controlled virtual mouse using OpenCV and MediaPipe, supporting cursor movement, click, scroll, and drag-and-drop operations with gesture stabilization and modular architecture.

projects.title: WasteWise
projects.description: It is an AI-powered waste segregation system that automatically classifies waste images into recyclable and non-recyclable categories using computer vision. The project focuses on building a robust binary classification pipeline through dataset restructuring, image preprocessing, and convolutional neural networks, enabling accurate and efficient waste identification to support sustainable recycling practices.
